catalog_row.Paper: The implications of financial frictions and imperfect knowledge in the estimated dsge model of the U.S. economy
catalog_row.ModelType: Estimated medium-scale DSGE with financial accelerator and adaptive learning
catalog_row.KeyFeatures: Smets-Wouters core; BGG financial accelerator; entrepreneurs and banks; external finance premium; adaptive learning with Kalman-filter belief updating; AR(2)+constant forecasting functions; Calvo prices and wages; habit; investment adjustment costs
catalog_row.RawPDF: raw/mmb_papers/The implications of financial frictions and imperfect knowledge in the estimated dsge model of the U.S. economy.pdf

status_row.paper_title: The implications of financial frictions and imperfect knowledge in the estimated dsge model of the U.S. economy
status_row.raw_pdf_path: raw/mmb_papers/The implications of financial frictions and imperfect knowledge in the estimated dsge model of the U.S. economy.pdf
status_row.notes: Primary Markdown matches title/author. Financial accelerator and learning equations are source-backed; inherited SW07 household, price, wage, and production blocks need review before promotion.

validation.check: English derivation has all eight sections
English and Chinese F-number counts match
validation.details: English count 87, Chinese count 87; 35 unique equation labels.

unresolved_issues: Inherited SW07 household, price, wage, and production equations are not fully reprinted in the Rychalovska paper and are marked needs_review.
Several MinerU OCR passages around wage Phillips and resource-constraint bank-spread terms need targeted PDF checks.
Full steady-state ordering was not reconstructed because the paper works with a linearized detrended system.
Dynare runtime validation was not performed.
